title: Webhook Verifier — Auto-Detection Expansion & Per-Provider Secret Rotation
description: webhook_verifier.py supports 8 providers (GitHub, GitLab, Jira, ServiceNow, Slack, PagerDuty, Stripe, Custom) with HMAC verification, auto-detection, SQLite audit log, and per-org stats. test_webhook_verifier.py validates the verify/detect/stats flow. Gap: provider secrets are stored as plaintext in the DB rather than using secrets_management_engine, and auto-detection heuristics are not updated when new provider signature formats emerge.
missing: Secret storage migration: move webhook provider secrets to secrets_management_engine with rotation support and TTL enforcement
Provider format auto-update: implement a provider_signature_formats.json that can be updated without code changes to add new provider detection patterns
Webhook replay attack prevention: add a 5-minute timestamp window check on all provider signatures to reject replayed webhook deliveries
